Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ancestor’s Spear]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — The Ancestor’s Spear can steal and process madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 2''' — The Ancestor’s Spear is a shining white weapon kept in a long wooden case.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — The original Matriarch of the Jai clan used the Ancestor’s Spear to steal the power of her foes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — The Ancestor’s Spear is a factor in the Jai clan's ability to withstand attacks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Jai Long carries the case for the Ancestor's Spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Jai Long did not use the Ancestor’s Spear in his recent confrontation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — The Ancestor’s Spear is a weapon held by the Jai Patriarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — The Ancestor’s Spear cannot help a practitioner advance to Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Jai Daishou uses the spear of his honored ancestor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — The Ancestor’s Spear is used by sacred artists to gain power.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Eithan takes the head of the Ancestor’s Spear.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
